title: bridge-jmap: email_get batches by max_objects_in_get but new_ids can be up to 10000 — up to 200 sequential HTTP requests per poll
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs email_get: chunks ids by max_objects_in_get (default 50) and issues one HTTP request per chunk. email_query can return up to MAX_PAGES * PAGE_SIZE = 200 * 50 = 10,000 ids. On first run against a large mailbox, seen_ids is empty so all 10,000 ids are new. email_get issues 10,000/50 = 200 sequential HTTP requests before returning. These happen in the background tokio task so the bridge is blocked from processing new polls for the entire duration. Scenario: first startup against a mailbox with >50 unseen emails; polling resumes only after all batches complete.
